title: Chapter 113
content:
Chapter 113: Iferaski Drinks Fullru’s Piss

Ah!

This is bad!

Iferaski had pressed her mouth tightly against Fullru’s crotch.

At this rate, I won’t get to see the sparkling urine or the sight of Iferaski getting splashed in the face.

In AVs and erotic videos, the one peeing and the one drinking are usually separated.

They can’t be stuck together!

Pull away!

I want to say that, but yesterday when I drank Fullru’s piss, I also put my mouth directly on her.

To drink it without spilling, this is the natural way.

Damn it.

I thought I’d get to see a scene straight out of an AV in real life...!

Chororo chororo...

"Nnh..."

Fullru’s cheeks were slightly flushed from the pleasant sensation of peeing, so she was definitely going right now.

Iferaski’s throat was making gulping sounds too, so she was definitely drinking.

But visually, there was nothing fun about it!

Seeing a girl pressing her mouth against another girl’s crotch had some erotic appeal, but her privates were completely hidden, there was no smell, and the sound was subdued!

Once the pee seemed to stop, Iferaski pulled her mouth away.

Unfortunately, neither of them showed much embarrassment, so it wasn’t very erotic...

Fullru was a little embarrassed, but only while she was actually peeing.

The moment it stopped, she was completely calm again.

This is what you call a paradox.

Fullru only let her drink it because she wasn’t overly embarrassed.

If she had been really embarrassed, she wouldn’t have let her drink it. Damn it...

At the very least, I wanted to carefully observe her saliva-wet crotch, but Iferaski thoughtfully put Fullru’s clothes back on.

Damn it, this horse girl is showing consideration in the most unexpected places again!

With her clothes back on, I couldn’t see Fullru’s crotch anymore.

Well, it is cold.

It would be bad if she caught a cold with her crotch exposed...

Someday I’ll dig an open-air bath or something and create a situation where I can bukkake them freely. Then I’ll have them do piss bukkake play.

For now, I’ll hold back. I’ll save the fun for later.

"Alright. Breakfast is done, so shall we do some capybara?"

"Capybara?"

"Yeah. Your muscles have weakened, so you still can’t move like before, right? You have to move a little at a time to get used to it again. It might be tough, but let’s do our best. Wait, that’s just rehabilitation!"

"...Eh?"

"...?"

Fullru and Iferaski stared blankly. It seemed my joke mixing up "rehabilitation" and "capybara" was too high-level for them to get.

"Anyway, by doing rehabilitation, you’ll be able to walk again."

"Understood."

I imitated the rehabilitation I once saw on TV, holding Fullru’s ankles and knees, bending and stretching them.

"Focus on the feeling of bending and stretching."

"Okay."

"Iferaski, learn how to do it too."

"...!"

After doing the legs, I did the arms.

I had Iferaski copy each one.

Good. Now with me and Iferaski as a two-person team handling meals, toilet, and rehabilitation, we should be able to keep this up unless something major happens.

I did about 30 minutes of rehabilitation on Fullru. Doing too much would tire her out, and accumulated fatigue would be bad.

"Alright, I’m heading out, but if you need anything while I’m gone, ask Iferaski."

"Got it."

"Iferaski, I’m counting on you."

"Pi!"

I’m relieved those two get along so well.

Now then— just as I was heading for the door—

"Ah. Right. Hey, Masharu. I’m tired, so give me some elixir in my ass."

Her voice was as casual as if she were asking someone to pass the soy sauce.

...I didn’t mishear. She clearly said "give me some elixir in my ass."

But maybe I did mishear?

Even though her attitude has softened, would she really say "give me some elixir in my ass" so casually?

I had planned to refuse, but I pretended I didn’t hear.

"Uh, what did you say?"

"N. I said give me some elixir in my ass. I’m tired and want to recover my stamina. Elixir is valuable, but you can produce it easily, right?"

"Well, that’s true, but..."

A 14-year-old elf girl with no experience of ever pooping due to her racial traits and zero anal experience was requesting anal sex.

For real?

Is she a massive pervert?

Did she get hooked on anal because I put it in while she was half-conscious yesterday?

"If you want it, I’ll happily do it, but are you sure?"

"I’m the one asking, so why are you questioning it? If anything, I feel bad that I can’t properly thank you."

...I see.

Iferaski is still in the room so she’ll see, but I guess it doesn’t matter.

Actually, doing it while being watched sounds good too.

I’ll show Iferaski where my cock and Fullru’s asshole connect and say, "Can you see how her anus is getting turned inside out?"

"Understood."

I postponed my plans to go out and returned deeper into the room.

"Lie on your stomach."

I helped Fullru get into the prone position.

"Spread your legs a little."

I had her spread her legs and realized I hadn’t done butt rehabilitation yet, so I kneaded her ass cheeks with both hands.

I massaged her entire butt by drawing circles—right hand clockwise, left hand counterclockwise.

"I’m loosening up your ass, so wait a bit."

"You need quite a lot of preparation, huh."

"Yeah. Producing the elixir is instant, but the prep takes time."

When I spread her cheeks apart, I could occasionally glimpse her tightly closed anus.

It was the same beautiful pure white as her skin with no pigmentation.

Yesterday I had smeared wine on it, so I couldn’t get a proper look at its natural state, but...

It’s this transparent and beautiful?

It’s a pearl-like asshole.

People often compare clits to pearls, but I never thought I’d look at an asshole and think of a pearl.

I touched it with my tongue.

It was hard.

Fullru’s anus was closed so tightly that yesterday’s anal insertion felt like a dream or illusion.

As expected, it was completely tasteless and odorless.

Even though she should have sweated during rehabilitation, there was no taste. Maybe because she doesn’t eat meat, even her sweat is like water.

"Hey, hey, my butt feels weird. It’s wet and ticklish."

"I’m licking it."

"Eh? You’re... licking...?"

Twitch, quiver.

Her ass shook slightly.

"Of course I am."

"Is that... normal?"

"Yeah. Dogs lick each other’s butts all the time, right?"

"U-Um, yeah."

"See?"

"...I don’t really get what you mean by ’see?’... but okay. Sorry for interrupting. Continue."

"Yeah."

Once it was wet enough with saliva, next was loosening it with fingers.

People who get used to Western erotic videos where they suddenly shove in apples or fists tend to forget, but you can’t just ram a cock into an inexperienced anus.

You have to train it carefully, like stretching exercises.

...At least, that’s what was written in the erotic manga.

I prefer manga that carefully depict the process of developing an inexperienced anus over ones where they just stick it in a pussy and then the ass too, so I’m quite knowledgeable about anal development.

I gently inserted one index finger.

Kuuh

, it was incredibly tight. Even though only the first joint was in, I already felt resistance like I had hit the end.

Yesterday I really managed to fit my cock into such a tiny hole. I’ll loosen the anal entrance little by little.

"Wait. My butt? The lower part of my body feels weird. What are you doing?"

"What do you mean? I just put my index finger in."

"You put... your index finger in?"

"Yeah. To insert my cock, I have to loosen your anus first."

"Wait. What do you mean by loosening the anus? If you loosen it, my organs and blood will come out and I’ll die."

"Ah— I said that yesterday too."

"I didn’t hear anything about loosening it."

...Didn’t I?

"But if I don’t loosen it, my cock won’t go in, right?"

"Now that you mention it, you did say that yesterday. Hey, what do you mean by putting your cock in?"

"...Eh? I explained it properly yesterday, didn’t I?"

"I didn’t hear it."

"You’re kidding, right?"

"I heard that elixir comes out of your cock and that you put the elixir in my ass."

"Yeah. So..."

Ah.

Wait. Did I never actually say I was inserting my cock into her ass?

Maybe Fullru thought that, like pouring wine from a bottle into a cup, I would produce elixir from my cock and then inject it into her ass by some other means?

I see. Inserting cock into ass was such common sense to me that I failed to explain it properly.

Yesterday Fullru was half-conscious and her lower body sensations were dulled, so she didn’t realize a cock had been put in her ass...

...Can’t be helped.

I’ll properly explain what loosening the anus means.

Luckily, we have a teaching aid right here. Let her learn by actually seeing it.

"...?"

When I looked over, the clueless Iferaski tilted her head.

Iferaski. You show her what an anus is by spreading it and demonstrating!
